english: What is the term of office for a member of the Rajya Sabha in India?
hindi: भारत में राज्यसभा के सदस्य का कार्यकाल क्या होता है?
vietnamese: Thời hạn nhiệm kỳ của một thành viên Rajya Sabha ở Ấn Độ là gì?
correct_answer: The term of office for a member of the Rajya Sabha is six years, with one-third of the members retiring every two years.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing incorrect information or refusing to answer due to lack of knowledge about the Indian government structure.
